title: The Aunts Strike Back
story: A comedy family saga. Over two previous trailers, the men of the family tried and failed to solve a family hair crisis — the wigs are stuck at Uncle Gadi's place in Eilat. Now the WOMEN take over: Roi's mother Orna (the boss) and the aunts. To show solidarity with Roi, every woman shaves her head bald. In the end there's a twist — Orna secretly knew where the wigs were the whole time. Moral: behind every bald family stands a mother; the women run the show. Keep the Operation Hair Transfer branding, and always include Uncle Efi (the only man they trust). Bilingual: English voiceover, Hebrew captions.

photos.label: The three brothers (incl. Roi) WITH hair — good for the opening hook
Uncle Gadi in Eilat (cyclist) — where the wigs are stuck
Orna, Roi's mother, WITH hair — the boss
Tali, aunt, WITH hair — the stylish diva
Uncle Efi + all the women together, WITH hair (identical framing to the 'after')
Uncle Efi + all the women together, ALL BALD (identical framing — perfect for a dissolve reveal)

video_caption: וכמובן... דוד אפי. היחיד שהן סומכות עליו
notes: Aim for ~15-18 scenes. Use hair->bald 'reveal' scenes for the aunts (fadewhite) and a 'dissolve' reveal for the Efi+women group photo since its framing is identical. End with a coming-soon and a closing line about the women running the show.
